description: Cadillac's first attempt at a sub CTS-V entry in the V-Series family. Rather than leaning towards GM's specialty in small-block V8s, they developed a twin-turbocharged V6 producing 464 horsepower to go after the F80-generation M3 of the time. This was the first full-fledged V product not powered by a V8 of any kind.
creator: Bnuuy
